nasb.text: The wicked have drawn the sword and bent their bow To cast down the afflicted and the needy, To slay those who are upright in conduct.

esv.text: The wicked draw the sword and bend their bows to bring down the poor and needy, to slay those whose way is upright;

cnv.text: 惡人已經拔出刀來，拉開了弓， 要打倒困苦和貧窮的人， 殺害行為正直的人。

ccb.text: 恶人拔剑张弓要消灭穷苦人， 杀戮正直人，

csbs.text: 恶人已经拔出刀剑，拉开了弓， 要使困苦人和贫穷人倒下， 要杀戮行为正直的人。
